title: Visvesvaraya Technological University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Visvesvaraya Technological University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Visvesvaraya Technological University Result 2026 Out for B.E 8th Semester 2021 Scheme on the official website - vtu.ac.in on 12-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the VTU result.

content.text: Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) has officially released the VTU B.E Result 2026 for 8th Semester examinations under the 2021 Scheme. The results have been announced for all regions, bringing an important update for final year engineering students.

VTU B.E Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - vtu.ac.in. Students who appeared for the B.E 8th Semester exams can now check and download their results by entering their USN (University Seat Number) through the official result portal.
Candidates are advised to verify all details mentioned in their scorecard carefully. In case of any discrepancies, they should contact the university authorities immediately for correction.

sections.heading: Visvesvaraya Technological University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Visvesvaraya Technological University has published the B.E 8th Semester results for the 2021 scheme across all regions. Students can access their results online using their USN through the official result portal.

sections.heading: Visvesvaraya Technological University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: VTU has activated the direct link to check B.E 8th Semester results for the 2021 scheme. Students can view and download their results instantly through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: Steps to Check VTU B.E Result 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check your result online:

items: Visit the official result portal - https://results.vtu.ac.in/indexD5J6.php
Your result will be displayed on the screen.
Download and take a printout for future reference.
